titleStmt.title: SII 25.189: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 189. (A.R. No. 189 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.

This epigraph may be assigned on palaeographical grounds to c. 13th Century. The record furnishes the details of date viz., year [10], Mīṉa śu 10, Tuesday, Punarpūśa-nakshatra corresponding to 1256 A.D., March 7.

It records a deed of agreement (iśaivu-tīṭṭu) given by the tāṉattār of the temple of Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiyār at Śāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉichchaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻavaḷanāḍu to Araiyaṉ Poṉṉambalakkūtaṉ alias Irumuḍiśōḻa-Pallavaraiyar of Kaḷarikkuḍi in Kūṭṭuk-kūṟṟam in Pāṇḍikulāśaṉi-vaḷanāḍu and to the cultivating tenants of the dēvadāṉa lands of the temple for the gift amount of 3000 kāśu and the paddy measuring a tūṇi for one vēli of land for the food-offerings, maintenance of lamps and worship to the goddess Buvaṉādipati-nāchchiyār installed by the above araiyaṉ in the western side prākāra (circumambulatory path) (also called tirunaḍaimāḷigai) in this temple. It is also mentioned that the wages for the sculptors named Tirukkoḍuṅguṉṟa-vayirāgi and Kōvāṇḍāṉ who came to carryout the repairs of the northern side tirunaḍaimāḷigai was to be met with from out of the money endowed above. The deed was recorded on stone by Viṭaṅkaṉ alias Vaḷavatoṅga-āchāriyaṉ, who had the right of Śippāchāriya-kāṇi in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[svastiśrī . tiri] puvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Irācentiracoḻa tevaṟkku yāṇṭu [10] vatuThe word ‘vatu’ is expressed by symbol.miṉanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu daśamiyum cevvāyk
kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ Irācentiracoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭu brahmatecam cāttāṉamā
ṉa keraḷakulācaṉi caruppeti maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉa muṭaiyārkoyil Āticaṇṭecura tevakaṉ mika
ḷom pāṇṭi kulācaṉi kkūṭṭuk kūṟṟattu kaḷarikkuṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ poṉṉampalakūttaṉṉāṉa Irumuṭi coḻap
pallavaraiyar tanta paricāvatu . Iṉṉāyaṉār koyil melaittirunaṭai māḷikaiyil Ivar Eḻunta
ruḷivitta puvaṉātipati nācciyāṟku Amutupaṭikku Ivūr Uṭaiyār tantakācu 3 1000
Digital edition of SII 25.189 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
